channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: You can soon live out your James Bond fantasies with retractable stud winter tires
item.description: In 1987's The Living Daylights, James Bond presses a dashboard button to activate retractable tire studs, giving the Aston Martin V8 Vantage he's driving more traction on a frozen lake. That tire technology is no longer limited to the movies. Later this year, Finnish tire brand Nokian is planning to launch a new snow tire […]

item.title: Warner Bros.’ Plans for ‘Game of Thrones’ Might Include an Aegon the Conqueror Movie
item.description: 'Andor' writer Beau Willimon has reportedly filed a script for a new Westeros movie.

item.title: Hands-on with the Honor Magic V6 — the stunning new foldable with 'world’s thinnest mobile phone battery'
item.description: The Honor Magic V6 boasts a refined design, an impressive camera with a 1-inch sensor and a variable telephoto zoom, plus a huge battery.

item.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra : on vous montre tous les compromis de l’affichage confidentiel
item.description: Nos tests sur l'écran du Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra montrent à quel point le filtre confidentiel altère la qualité d'affichage. C'est pourtant loin d'être un défaut.

item.title: Everything Apple announced this week: iPhone 17e, new MacBooks, M4 iPad Air and more
item.description: Apple has promised a “big week” for the company, which includes an in-person event for press and creators on March 4. But it didn’t exactly wait until Wednesday to get things started. The news started on Monday with the announcements of the iPhone 17e and M4-powered iPad Air. The company followed up on Tuesday with the reveal of the M5 MacBook Air, the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, MacBook Pro models that use said chips, a refreshed Studio Display and a brand-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR. In addition, ahead of an official announcement, Apple leaked news of a cheaper MacBook called the MacBook Neo...

item.title: Audible launches a cheaper ‘Standard’ subscription plan, challenging Spotify
item.description: The new plan is $6 cheaper than the platform's existing "Premium" plan, which costs $14.95 per month.

item.title: Watch out - Gemini will now remember all your work chats, and display them right in Google Workspace
item.description: Google adds new Gemini conversation history and auto chat deletion controls for Workspace customers.

item.title: Grand ménage de printemps chez Roborock : jusqu’à -650 euros sur ses meilleurs aspirateurs-robots [Sponso]
item.description: Roborock célèbre le printemps avec de belles promotions sur ses meilleurs aspirateurs-robots. La marque affiche jusqu’à 650 euros de remise sur ses robots d’ici au 16 mars 2026.

item.title: Les nouveaux MacBook Air et Pro ne sont plus fournis avec un adaptateur secteur en France
item.description: Même si Apple a réussi à ne pas faire exploser les prix de ses nouveaux MacBook malgré la flambée des coûts de la mémoire, il n’empêche : ces machines représentent tout de même un investissement conséquent. Et il faudra ajouter à la facture un adaptateur secteur, que le constructeur ne fournit plus !

item.title: Notre sélection des meilleurs chargeurs rapides pour smartphone ou PC
item.description: Quel chargeur rapide acheter pour votre smartphone ? Toutes les normes de charge ne se ressemblent pas entre Samsung, Apple, Google, Xiaomi, Oppo… Découvrez notre sélection de chargeurs rapides pour smartphones, PC ou même votre casque audio.

item.title: Blink's latest Outdoor Camera 2K+ 'takes home security to the next level' — and it just got its first-ever discount
item.description: The Blink Outdoor Camera 2K+ has just been released, but it's already 50% off in this excellent Amazon deal ahead of the Spring Deal Days event.

item.title: Blue Prince is out on Switch 2 today, complete with mouse control
item.description:
The unique and highly addictive roguelike Blue Prince is now available for Switch 2, as announced at today's Nintendo Indie World Showcase. This version allows for mouse control, via the underutilized Joy-Con feature. This is a wonderfully designed puzzle game that oozes atmosphere. The game tasks players with exploring a gigantic mansion, but there's a twist. You actually build this mansion as you explore, room by room. This is done by placing what can only be described as magical blueprints.
The goal is to fully explore the mansion and solve its many, many mysteries. However, there are only...

item.title: Skip the all-new Galaxy Buds 4 Pro — the excellent Buds Pro 3 earbuds are now cheaper than ever at Walmart
item.description: No need to preorder Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, I recommend buying the Galaxy Buds Pro earbuds for a record-low price of just $104 at Walmart.

item.title: Blue Prince just got a Switch 2 release date, alongside 17 more game announcements — here are the top 3 games from the latest Indie World Showcase coming to the Switch consoles that I'm most excited for
item.description: The Indie World Showcase for March 2026 has wrapped! Here are the top three Nintendo Switch games from the presentation I'm most looking forward to.

item.title: Looking for a budget-friendly, subscription-free security camera? I've been hands-on with the IMOU Cell 3C, and it could be exactly what you need
item.description: This wireless camera is one of the most affordable security systems around, with no subscription necessary.

item.title: En pleine pénurie de RAM, Boulanger casse en deux le prix de ce laptop HP équipé de 32 Go
item.description: Remise XXL chez Boulanger qui se charge de retirer 550 euros au prix de cet HP OmniBook 5. L'occasion de profiter d'un solide PC portable équipé d'un écran OLED et de plus de 30 heures d'autonomie.

item.title: No, the sub-$500 PC market will not disappear by 2028 - Au contraire, I expect it to thrive. Here's why
item.description: The sub-$500 PC market is huge and yet Gartner wants us to believe that it will disappear within 100 weeks.

item.title: Apple’s website leaks MacBook ‘Neo,’ which could be its new cheaper laptop
item.description: On Tuesday, during Apple's weeklong product launch event, a listing for the "MacBook Neo (Model A3404)" appeared on a regulatory compliance page on Apple's website under its lineup of 2026 MacBooks. First spotted by MacRumors, the listing appears to be an accident and has since been removed, but may have been a leaked reference to […]

item.title: 4-Body Problem: Astronomers Spot the Most Tightly Packed Quadruple Star System Yet
item.description: The four-star system features three stars in stable orbits, plus a fourth at a distance equal to Jupiter's orbit around our Sun.

item.title: EA continues to ‘evolve’ The Sims 4 with new virtual currency and a ‘maker’ program
item.description: EA is adding some big changes to The Sims 4: Later this month, it's introducing an in-game marketplace where users can buy creator-made items using a new in-game currency called "Moola." The announcements mark another big shift for the game, which went free to play back in 2022. Creators who want to sell in-game items […]

item.title: Conférence sur l’IA | ALL IN à Vancouver et à Toronto avant Montréal
item.description: La conférence annuelle montréalaise ALL IN, la plus importante au Canada à être dédiée à l’intelligence artificielle (IA), prendra de l’expansion en 2026 avec le lancement des « ALL IN Talks ».

item.title: X begins testing standalone X Chat app on iOS
item.description: The new app promises a way to send and receive messages without being distracted by your timeline.

item.title: MacBook Neo : Apple aurait dévoilé par erreur le nom du MacBook « low cost »
item.description: L'annonce la plus attendue d'Apple cette semaine est sans aucun doute son tout nouveau MacBook. Il devrait être dévoilé ce mercredi 4 mars 2026, mais en attendant, Apple aurait publié par erreur son nom : MacBook Neo.

item.title: Unihertz’s new QWERTY phone is even more like a Blackberry
item.description: Unihertz, known for its slab phone alternatives, has unveiled an evolution of its device with a physical keyboard: The Titan 2 Elite. It's smaller and sleeker than the (aptly named) Titan that precedes it, comes in the orange color that's all the rage right now, and looks a heck of a lot like a Blackberry. […]

item.title: Apple unveils new MacBook Air and MacBook Pro with M5
item.description: These updated M5 chips were specifically designed to make the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro laptops better at handling intensive AI tasks.

item.title: Get up to $50 to watch For All Mankind season 5 with this stellar VPN deal
item.description: NordVPN is the best streaming VPN for unlocking content everywhere including For All Mankind 2026 – and you can buy Nord for 74% off with a free Amazon $50 voucher worth .

item.title: Apple's cheap MacBook could be called the MacBook Neo
item.description: “MacBook Neo” appears to be the name of Apple’s long-rumored cheap MacBook, based on a regulatory posting on Apple’s website, MacRumors reports. The gaffe was quickly removed from Apple’s site (pour one out for the poor soul who posted it). Previous rumors didn’t attach a name to the low-cost MacBook — I figured Apple would just revive the clean and simple “MacBook” branding. The name MacBook Neo sounds like something we’d see from ASUS or Acer, it’s just trying a bit too hard to seem cool.To recap, Apple is expected to unveil its first low-cost MacBook laptop tomorrow (and personally, I think...

item.title: Le MacBook pas cher pourrait bien s’appeler… MacBook Neo
item.description: Après le MacBook Air et le MacBook Pro, place au… MacBook Neo ! Ce n’est pas une blague, le fameux portable « pas cher » qu’Apple semble garder au chaud jusqu’à probablement demain a fuité (!) sur le site du constructeur. Mais en dehors du nom, c’est tout ce que l’on sait pour le moment.

item.title: The best mobile tech announced at MWC 2026 so far
item.description: Mobile World Congress 2026 is still in full swing in Barcelona, Spain, with announcements continuing to come from the mobile-focused show that runs until March 5th. To make sure you don't miss the best new smartphones, laptops, concepts, and accessories, we're rounding up all the most newsworthy gadgets that have debuted so far at MWC […]

item.title: 2025 was the year AI grew up. How will AI evolve in 2026?
item.description: What we can expect from AI going forward - from proactive AI to invisible intelligence.

item.title: Pourquoi le MacBook Air M5 est plus performant en Wi-Fi que le MacBook Pro de base
item.description: Apple vient de dévoiler son MacBook Air M5 dernier cri. Au-delà de sa puce, ce nouvel ultraportable intègre désormais le Wi-Fi 7. De quoi dépasser un MacBook Pro M5 de base relégué à l'ancienne norme de connectivité.

item.title: China’s economy is losing momentum, as its national congress prepares for meetings in Beijing
item.description: The weeklong meetings will bring nearly 3,000 deputies to Beijing. China’s progress in building a modern economy, evident in its kung-fu fighting robots and self-parking cars, is hitting limits as a downturn in its housing industry drags on, small businesses suffer and young people struggle to find jobs.The gap between Chinese leader Xi Jinping’s high-tech, artificial intelligence-driven ambitions and the hard realities of slowing growth is the backdrop for the annual meeting of the country’s largely ceremonial national legislature, the National People’s Congress, which begins Thursday.During ...

item.title: 2027 Audi RS5 first drive: Big thrills with a big battery
item.description: There's more waffling going on about the future of electric vehicles in America right now than you might expect at a Belgian breakfast buffet. Some brands like Hyundai are staying committed, some brands like Honda are dialing back, and everyone else is simply doing their damndest to provide as many propulsion options as possibleCount Audi in that last category. On the EV side, it recently launched the new Q6 E-Tron and refreshed the ballistic E-Tron GT. On the internal combustion side, it has a new A6, and there's a full-size, three-row SUV coming in the form of the Q9. The company's latest ca...

item.title: The price of silver is falling again: Why safe-haven assets are down as the Middle East crisis escalates
item.description: Precious metals, especially gold, rose on Monday following news of the attack on Iran, but they’re seeing a reversal today. Here’s the latest. In a year of tremendous uncertainty, one of the few constants has been the swift uptick in gold and silver prices.

item.title: All of Amazon’s kid-friendly Kindles are on sale, including the color version
item.description: Let me let you in on a little secret: Amazon’s kid-friendly e-readers are a better deal than the standard models. Each so-called “Kids” device is identical to its non-Kids counterpart, except that it comes with a protective case, an extended two-year warranty against damage, and six months of Amazon Kids Plus. They also include optional […]

item.title: This powerhouse MSI laptop pairs 13th Gen Core i7 performance with RTX 4050 graphics for seriously heavy workloads - and it's just had a price cut
item.description: MSI Cyborg laptop packs a Core i7-13620H CPU, RTX 4050 GPU, 16GB of DDR5 memory, and a 512GB NVMe SSD, giving creatives and multitaskers the speed and graphics power they need.

item.title: À moins de 500 €, le Xiaomi 14T Pro avec 512 Go de stockage reste une excellente option malgré l’arrivée du 15T Pro en fin d’année dernière
item.description: Avec le 14T Pro, Xiaomi propose un smartphone haut de gamme accessible qui brille avec son écran AMOLED et son module photo Leica, surtout qu'il passe de 899,99 euros à 488,99 euros sur Cdiscount.

item.title: Microsoft warns of OAuth phishing campaigns able to bypass email and browser defenses - says 'these campaigns demonstrate that this abuse is operational, not theoretical'
item.description: An OAuth feature is being abused in the wild to drop malware to people's computers.

item.title: What do you think of EVs? Take our survey for a chance to win a £100 Amazon voucher
item.description: Take our drivers' survey for a chance to win a £100 Amazon voucher

item.title: The super-fast Asus ROG Rapture Wi-Fi 6E router got 5 stars in our review - now it's just $290 with Newegg's promo code
item.description: Asus ROG Rapture GT-AXE16000 router drops to under $300 and delivers quad-band Wi-Fi 6E speeds up to 16000Mbps, dual 10G ports, and a 2.5G WAN port.

item.title: Quelle est la meilleure voiture Tesla à choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Si la marque Tesla vous attire, mais que vous avez du mal à vous y retrouver entre les différentes versions disponibles, ce guide est fait pour vous. Découvrez les différents véhicules de la gamme pour y voir plus clair et déterminer quelle Tesla choisir.

item.title: Apple Announces M5 MacBook Air With Double the Starting Storage
item.description: Double the storage but more expensive than the MacBook Air M4, too.

item.title: The Future of ‘Dungeons & Dragons’ Is Looking a Little Video Game-y
item.description: Wizards of the Coast's new roadmap for 'D&D' in 2026 looks a little less tabletop, and a little more live service.

item.title: We played Pokémon Pokopia, ask us anything
item.description: Pokémon's 30th anniversary is here and Nintendo (and The Pokémon Company, Game Freak, and Omega Force) are kicking things off with a surprisingly excellent life simulation spinoff game. Pokémon Pokopia arrives on March 5th, and it's one of the first Pokémon titles that will debut exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2. Equal parts Animal Crossing, […]...

item.title: Scott Pilgrim creator Bryan Lee O’Malley on taking ‘another run’ with new game
item.description: It's been a busy few years for Scott Pilgrim. Following a live-action film and the conclusion of the comics in 2010, the series has slowly been coming back to life. First, in 2021 Scott Pilgrim vs. The World: The Game was rereleased on modern consoles after years of being inaccessible. Two years later came an […]

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, March 4 (game #997)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, March 4 (game #731)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 'The sub-$500 entry-level PC segment will disappear by 2028': Gartner predicts that budget computers are on borrowed time
item.description: Severity of RAM crisis could mean the sub-$500 PC market will 'disappear by 2028' according to one analyst firm.

item.title: Why the best teams treat feedback as a practice—not an event
item.description: It can be tough to give. It can be uncomfortable. But withholding honest feedback is a disservice—to employees, and to the company. One of the great tales from basketball lore is how coach Phil Jackson led teams like the Bulls and the Lakers to dynasty status. Working with legends like Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant, he might have let the all-stars run the show. Instead, his success hinged on transparency. Jackson gave players clear, constructive feedback. For example, he urged Jordan to cut back on scoring and involve his teammates more, recognizing that team success required more than a scor...

item.title: Europe’s digital infrastructure is running out of room in its traditional centers
item.description: Demand for compute is colliding with physical and regulatory limits in FLAP markets.
